Plaintiffs Notice Of And Request For Prove Up Hearing For Entry Of Court Judgment
Off Calendar Dec-02-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Prove-Up Hearing as to defaulted defendant Premier Desserts, Inc., a California corporation.
Dept. 514. Judge: Murlene J. Randle. Clerk: K. Dougherty. Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 10:16 a.m.

Kristine Craig, Esq. appeared for plaintiff S.F. Centre Limited Partnership, a Delaware limited partnership.
Stephen Siegmann, Assistant General Manager for S.F. Centre Limited Partnership, was placed under oath and testified.
Ms. Craig and Mr. Siegmann appeared via ZOOM for this morning's hearing.
No appearance by defendant Premier Desserts, Inc., a California corporation.

Plaintiff's Complaint for Damages for Breach of Lease was filed on January 26, 2021, and personally served on defendant Premier Desserts, Inc.'s Authorized Agent for Process on February 8, 2021.
Default as to defendant Premier Desserts, Inc., a California corporation, was entered on April 1, 2021.
DOE defendants were dismissed on July 7, 2021.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff S.F. Centre Limited Partnership, a Delaware limited partnership, and against the defaulted defendant Premier Desserts, Inc., a California corporation, as follows:

Damages/Principal - $870,642.38.
Attorney Fees - $2,825.00.
Costs - $597.25.

Total - $874,064.63.

Counsel for plaintiff shall prepare the proposed Judgment and submit same to the Court for review and signature.

Proceedings concluded at 10:41 a.m.

Plaintiffs Notice Of And Request For Prove Up Hearing For Entry Of Court Judgment
